text.title: Resource Management Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.fix: Re-plan to 70% cap; defer or split tasks.

antipattern.symptom: Person assigned to task requiring skill they lack.
antipattern.fix: Flag as gap; assign skilled person or train.

antipattern.symptom: Actuals logged only at end of month.
